Profile source, layering, and selection contract
reviewed transition, dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 4 of the exact eleven-file HCM-1.3 planning subject. Reviews 1 and 2 produced and then verified bounded API/TDD/inventory remediations; Review 3 returned only a model-capacity error and no verdict. Current authoritative packet bytes are unchanged since the 29-file facade remediation. The newly manifested subject includes all prior dispatch/proof bytes and the capacity stop. Independently derive a complete verdict from live authority and source; do not inherit a prior reviewer or parent conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted eleven-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of the phase map, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, all four proof/evidence files, and all three predecessor review dispatches.
Read unchanged control-pack authority, HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2 packets/closeouts, live HCM-1.2 source/tests/definitions/package proof/public APIs, and official dependency documentation only as needed.
Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, fixed-surface/facade inventory, API feasibility, TDD ordering, package-topology, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, setup/doctor, canonical YAML/content, HCM-1.4+, SDK, CLI, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.
Do not infer an unspecified schema, ID, fingerprint, default, compatibility, migration, fallback, product adoption, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat the Review 3 capacity error as a substantive review result.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact eleven-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.

Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order. Every actionable finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated authority/invariant/gate, concrete failure, smallest valid remediation, and invalidated proof.
Reproduce the exact 29-file direct fixed-surface/facade scan, compare the literal set, independently inspect wildcard/re-export facades, and verify every later-owner disposition.
Verify every prior remediation: frozen public value APIs/borrowing, genuine red-before-production ordering, complete direct fixed-surface/facade set, and truthful immutable evidence lineage.

Verify the selected-profile registry owner boundary, unchanged HCM-1.2 API consumption, role/capability/custom-ID support, data-driven fields, construction/fail-fast/provider/order behavior, structural-validation routing, and no enum/legacy/fallback/dynamic/product-adoption escape.
Verify trusted path/source/identity/fingerprint/duplicate/compatibility/dependency/error protections and absence of unjustified limits or executable semantic hooks.

Verify exact allowed files/new areas/symbol ownership, TDD increments, literal positive/N-N+1/negative/security/regression/Windows/package/scope proof, classification ceiling, exit gate, and stop conditions are independently implementable.
Verify literal package member set equality plus per-member hash/size remains required and no count-only proof or fixture becomes package authority.
Verify all subject files agree on planning-only status, evidence lineage, non-goals, fresh review/two-commit closeout, exact future implementation boundary, and terminal stop before HCM-1.4.
Verify todo is entirely unchecked, planning is docs-only, all coupled control bytes are manifested, and invalidated/capacity evidence is clearly non-authoritative.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than filling a missing schema, identifier, fingerprint, default, compatibility, migration, fallback, product-adoption, or later-slice decision by inference.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-1.4+, or a global handoff/ledger mutation.
